title: Hackathon Score Input
description: Schema for the CSV rows consumed by scripts/score_calc.py. Each object represents one judge's scores for one team.

team_name.description: Name of the team being scored

judge_name.description: Name of the judge submitting scores

technical.description: Technical achievement score (0–10). Required field — do not remove.

innovation.description: Innovation / creativity score (0–10). Required field — do not remove.

impact.description: Impact / usefulness score (0–10). Customizable — can be renamed or removed if rubric is updated.

presentation.description: Presentation quality score (0–10). Customizable — can be renamed or removed if rubric is updated.
